title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 16 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 16 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 16 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 16/06/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 0.12% today, the main contract closed at 815.The traders' willingness to ship is general. The steel mills arenot active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is general. PBF at Tangshan port deal 880 yuan/mt,increase 5 yuan/mt.
